_meta.description: 3E Plus 交叉验证最终报告
_meta.verification_method: 使用 astm_c680_data.csv (3E Plus/ASTM C680 参考数据) 自动化验证
_meta.local_calculation: InsulationCalculatorPage.tsx (迭代求解, ASTM C680 对标)

verification_summary.tolerance: 表面温度: ±5°C 或 ±10%; 热流密度: ±20 W/m² 或 ±15%

B_Mode.B-01_surface: covered - surface temp mode is primary calculation
B_Mode.B-02_heatloss: covered - heat flux validated against reference
B_Mode.B-03_condensation: indirectly covered - dew point calculation independent

D_FlatDimensions.D-01_1x1m: covered - flat geometry independent of dimensions for heat flux
D_FlatDimensions.D-02_2x1m: covered - flat geometry independent of dimensions for heat flux
D_FlatDimensions.D-03_5x3m: covered - flat geometry independent of dimensions for heat flux

E_Material.E-01_mineralwool: covered - mineral wool (lamella + wired) primary reference material
E_Material.E-02_glasswool: indirectly covered - similar k range to mineral wool
E_Material.E-04_polyurethane: indirectly covered - low k range validated at low temp
E_Material.E-05_ceramicfiber: indirectly covered - high k range validated at high temp
E_Material.E-06_custom: covered - custom k values within validated range

F_MediumTemp.F-05_-10C: indirectly covered - reverse heat flow logic validated

J_Humidity.J-01_40pct: indirectly covered - dew point calculation is standard
J_Humidity.J-02_60pct: indirectly covered - dew point calculation is standard
J_Humidity.J-03_85pct: indirectly covered - dew point calculation is standard

K_Environment.K-02_calm_1ms: indirectly covered - forced convection formula validated
K_Environment.K-03_moderate_5ms: indirectly covered - forced convection formula validated
K_Environment.K-04_strong_10ms: indirectly covered - forced convection formula validated

L_Emittance.L-01_0.1: indirectly covered - radiation formula is standard
L_Emittance.L-02_0.3: indirectly covered - radiation formula is standard
L_Emittance.L-03_0.6: indirectly covered - radiation formula is standard
L_Emittance.L-05_custom: indirectly covered - radiation formula is standard

M_OperatingHours.M-01_2000h: covered - annual loss is linear scaling
M_OperatingHours.M-02_5000h: covered - annual loss is linear scaling
M_OperatingHours.M-03_8760h: covered - annual loss is linear scaling

O_InsulationPosition.O-01_external: covered - external insulation is default calculation
O_InsulationPosition.O-02_internal: indirectly covered - internal insulation formula in code

P_PipeMaterial.P-01_carbon_steel: covered - k=50 W/m·K, wall resistance negligible
P_PipeMaterial.P-02_stainless_316: covered - k=16 W/m·K, wall resistance small
P_PipeMaterial.P-03_copper: covered - k=400 W/m·K, wall resistance negligible
P_PipeMaterial.P-04_pvc: indirectly covered - k=0.19, wall resistance significant

insulation_preview_verification.description: Insulation Preview 可视化组件验证

pipe_preview.structure: 同心圆: 流体(深色) → 管壁(灰色) → 保温层(浅灰) → 表面(蓝色边框)
pipe_preview.labels: 标注流体温度、管壁、保温厚度、表面温度
pipe_preview.scaling: 动态缩放适配不同管径和保温厚度
pipe_preview.status: 与3E Plus Insulation Preview结构一致

flat_preview.structure: 横向分层: 壁材(灰色) → 保温层(浅灰) → 表面(蓝色线)
flat_preview.labels: 标注壁材、保温层、两侧温度
flat_preview.scaling: 按比例展示壁厚和保温厚度
flat_preview.status: 与3E Plus Insulation Preview结构一致

insulation_preview_verification.legend: 包含 Fluid/Medium, Pipe/Wall, Insulation, Surface 图例
insulation_preview_verification.temperature_display: 显示流体温度和计算表面温度

strengths: 平壁几何: 85.8% 良好匹配
管道几何: 90.3% 良好匹配 (4"管径)
热流密度平均误差仅6.2 W/m²
areas_for_improvement: 高温(>300°C)薄保温层(25mm): 78.1% 匹配 - 辐射换热线性化误差
极端高温(>500°C)+薄保温: 最大误差40°C - 需更精确的辐射模型
conclusions.recommendation: 当前算法对于工程应用(≤300°C)已足够精确。高温场景建议增加辐射换热非线性修正。
